section.foot: One platform. Each business with its own voice.
section.sub: Barbershop, salon, nails, spa, or clinic — Acomply adapts bookings, services, customers, and WhatsApp to each business's rhythm.

mia.hero_tagline: Acomply's artificial intelligence. One assistant that welcomes your customers, promotes your business, and understands your numbers — all from WhatsApp.

step1.desc: Mía responds with your real hours, confirms appointments, and adapts her tone to each customer — regional Colombian tones from coastal to highland, formal to casual.
step1.title: Replies to every WhatsApp, even at 2 a.m.

step2.desc: Mía spots gaps in your calendar, groups dormant customers, and sends promos on WhatsApp. You approve, she sends.
step2.title: Fills your slow days automatically.

step3.desc: Mía answers with real data: sales, customers, slow days. No jargon, no guesses.
step3.title: Ask anything about your business.

step4.desc: Mía works nonstop for you — receiving, promoting, and analyzing — so your business grows while you serve customers.
step4.title: More bookings, fewer gaps, better decisions.

features: Segments customers by frequency, spend, and service
Suggests promos based on slow days
Generates message and image in your style
marketing_ia.lead: Spots gaps in your calendar, groups customers who haven't visited in a while, and prepares campaigns ready to send on WhatsApp. You approve; she sends and measures what worked.
marketing_ia.plan_note: Customize the tone for your brand and your clientele.

pricing.sub: Three plans. No long contracts, no fine print. AI starts with Maestro.

tier_esencial.name: Acomply Esencial

h1.line2: Buy top-ups only when you need them.

recargas.micro: Top-ups are paid only when you use them.

looks.sub: Styles, cuts, and color generated from a selfie.

items.a: No. We use the official WhatsApp Business API (Meta). We don't clone numbers or operate in gray areas. Your account and your customers' accounts are protected and comply with the platform's rules.

items.q: Do I have to learn technology?
items.a: No. If you know how to send an audio on WhatsApp, you know how to use Acomply. We help you with the initial setup in a 30-minute call, and from then on everything runs from your phone.

items.q: Does it work if I work alone, without a team?
items.a: Yes. Acomply Esencial is designed for exactly that: one person, no AI but the full booking, reminders, and payments system. If you grow later or want the AI to reply for you, you upgrade to Maestro and keep the same data.

items.q: What happens to my customers' data?
items.a: Your data is yours. We comply with Law 1581 of 2012 (Habeas Data — Colombia's data protection law), encrypt the information, and only send marketing messages to customers who have given explicit consent. You can export or delete your data anytime.

items.q: Can the AI make up answers or numbers?
items.a: No. The AI Receptionist only confirms real hours from your calendar — never improvises. The Analyst assistant answers only with data that exists in your account — if it doesn't know something, it says so. Zero hallucinations.
Yes, anytime, with no penalties and no paperwork. You cancel from the app and your data stays accessible for 60 days if you decide to come back.

items.q: How long does it take to get up and running?
items.a: Setup in 15 minutes. We connect your WhatsApp, load your services and hours, and your booking page is ready. If you move to Maestro, the AI learns your tone in a short session.

faq.sub: If your question isn't here, WhatsApp us and we'll reply in minutes — not a bot, a real person on the team.
